---
title: "Social Science Research Network (SSRN)"
page-layout: article
---

# Social Science Research Network (SSRN)

## Description

Repository of working papers, accepted papers, and abstracts across social science disciplines. Supports discovery of current research in accounting, economics, finance, marketing, and law.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Social Sciences, News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Market Research, News & Current Events
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Market Research, News & Current Events

## Links

- [Access resource](http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb1208)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
